title: Enrollment of Additional Ships. The principal/employer, within the validity
content: 44 of its accreditation, may request the enrollment of additional ships through submission of 45 the documentary requirements outlined in Section 108, Items F to J, along with a formal 46 letter of request from the LMA and confirmation from the principal/employer. 47 48 Other requirements for other types of ships per Section 109 (Other Requirements for 49 Accreditation of Principal/Employers with Other Types of Vessels) shall also apply. 50 51
